mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NO, BALANCE, STATUS FROM TB_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM TB_TRANSFER WHERE FROM_ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo} AND TRANSFER_DATE = CURRENT_DATE AND STATUS = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_TRANSFER ( TRANSFER_ID, FROM_ACCOUNT_NO, TO_ACCOUNT_NO, AMOUNT, STATUS, TRANSFER_DATE ) VALUES ( #{transferId}, #{fromAccountNo}, #{toAccountNo}, #{amount}, 'COMPLETED', CURRENT_DATE )
